name: Blood Moon
description: A Halloween highball that mixes white rum, blood orange sour, and ginger beer over ice. A quenching Halloween treat that is eerily delicious and spookily satisfying.
ingredients: 30 ml Finest Call® Blood Orange Sour
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Garnish with a blood orange wheel or fangs.
searchable_text: Blood Moon main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A Halloween highball that mixes white rum, blood orange sour, and ginger beer over ice. A quenching Halloween treat that is eerily delicious and spookily satisfying. ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 30 ml Finest Call® Blood Orange Sour, 89 ml ginger beer recipe steps Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. Add all ingredients. Stir to combine. Garnish with a blood orange wheel or fangs.
